# GreenTrack Coaching & Consulting — Full Site Content for AI Systems

> This document provides comprehensive page-level content summaries for GreenTrack Coaching & Consulting Ltd (https://greentrackcc.com) to support accurate AI-generated answers. For the brief overview, see https://greentrackcc.com/llms.txt.

---

## Business Identity

- Legal name: GreenTrack Coaching & Consulting Ltd
- Company number: 16247877 (registered in England and Wales)
- Registered address: 2 The Old Estate Yard, High Street, East Hendred, Wantage, Oxfordshire, OX12 8JY, United Kingdom
- Website: https://greentrackcc.com
- Contact email: nicola@greentrackcc.com
- Primary contact: Nicola Nevill (also known as Nicola Salter)
- Geographic base: Oxfordshire, UK
- Geographic coverage: worldwide

---

## Home Page (https://greentrackcc.com/)

GreenTrack Coaching & Consulting offers executive coaching, leadership development, team facilitation, and motorsport and engineering career mentoring. The business is led by Nicola Nevill, a Henley Business School qualified executive coach and ICF member based in Oxfordshire, working with leaders and organisations worldwide.

### Services offered

1. Leadership and Executive Coaching — one-to-one coaching for senior leaders, managers and emerging talent. Focus areas include navigating complexity, building clarity and confidence, leadership development, and career transitions.

2. Team Coaching and Facilitation — bespoke sessions for leadership teams, cross-functional groups and organisations undergoing change. Includes strategy away days, leadership team off-sites and workshops.

3. Motorsport and Engineering Career Mentoring — paid, personalised mentoring from Doug Nevill (close to 30 years Formula One design) and Nicola Nevill for engineers and professionals entering, progressing in, or leaving motorsport.

### Who coaching is for

Nicola works with people who are: facing a significant decision or transition; carrying a challenge they cannot share with those around them; wanting to lead with greater clarity and confidence; feeling stuck or without clear direction; stepping into a new leadership role; or ready to invest in their development.

### How to start

Initial conversations with Nicola are complimentary and carry no obligation. Contact via https://greentrackcc.com/contact or nicola@greentrackcc.com. Nicola responds within 24 hours.

---

## About Nicola Nevill (https://greentrackcc.com/about)

Nicola Nevill, also known as Nicola Salter, is a qualified executive coach and leadership consultant based in Oxfordshire, UK. She has over 25 years of experience supporting people and teams in high-performance environments, including elite motorsport and advanced engineering.

### Qualifications and credentials

- Professional Certificate in Executive Coaching, Henley Business School, UK
- MSc in Coaching for Behavioural Change, Henley Business School, UK (currently in progress)
- Member, International Coaching Federation (ICF) — adhering to ICF professional code of ethics
- Fundamentals Part I: Systemic Coaching and Constellations (ICF-accredited training)
- Chartered Fellow of the CIPD (Chartered Institute of Personnel and Development, UK)

### Coaching philosophy

Nicola describes her approach in three principles:

1. Partner, Not Expert: she does not lead with models or frameworks. She partners with the individual, following what matters most in each conversation.

2. Complexity is Welcome: she helps clients understand what is happening within themselves and in the dynamics around them.

3. Forward with Purpose: every conversation aims to create clarity, insight, and meaningful next steps.

### LinkedIn

https://www.linkedin.com/in/nicolasalter/

---

## Coaching Services (https://greentrackcc.com/coaching)

### What is executive coaching?

Executive coaching is a professional development process where a qualified coach works one-to-one with a leader to help them build clarity and move forward with greater confidence and purpose. It is not advice-giving or consulting. It is a thought-provoking, confidential partnership.

### Who is it for?

Senior leaders, managers and emerging talent across sectors and career stages. People dealing with specific challenges, career transitions, or wanting to lead more effectively.

### Focus areas

- Understanding self and identity in work
- Leadership development and confidence
- Navigating change, transition and uncertainty
- Building clarity, resilience and perspective

### Team coaching and facilitation

Nicola designs and facilitates bespoke sessions for leadership teams, cross-functional groups and organisations navigating change. This includes strategy away days, leadership team sessions and cross-functional workshops focused on alignment, communication and building healthier ways of working.

### Broader coaching support

For larger programmes, Nicola works with a trusted network of qualified coaches and facilitators, maintaining the same standard of quality across all client engagements.

### How the process works

1. Complimentary initial conversation to explore the situation, understand goals, and assess fit.
2. Agreement on focus, structure and cadence. Most clients work for 6 to 12 sessions over 3 to 9 months.
3. Sessions in person (Oxfordshire) or remotely worldwide.

### Frequently asked questions

Q: What is executive coaching?
A: Executive coaching is a professional development process where a qualified coach works one-to-one with a leader to help them build clarity and move forward with greater confidence and purpose. It is not advice-giving or consulting: it is a thought-provoking partnership.

Q: Who is executive coaching for?
A: Executive coaching is for senior leaders, managers and emerging talent who want to lead with greater clarity, confidence and self-awareness. Nicola works with people across sectors and career stages.

Q: Where does Nicola Nevill offer coaching?
A: Nicola is based in Oxfordshire and works with clients globally. Sessions are available in person and remotely, anywhere in the world.

Q: Is coaching confidential?
A: Yes. Coaching conversations are fully confidential. Information shared during sessions will not be disclosed to third parties without consent, except where required by law.

Q: How many coaching sessions will I need?
A: Most clients work with Nicola for six to twelve sessions over three to nine months, though this varies depending on goals and situation. The initial conversation is always complimentary and carries no commitment.

---

## Motorsport and Engineering Mentoring (https://greentrackcc.com/mentoring)

### About the mentoring

GreenTrack offers practical, experience-led mentoring for people shaping their future in motorsport, engineering, or exploring life beyond motorsport. The mentors have both spent many years in high-performance environments, from elite motorsport to advanced engineering.

### Doug Nevill — Technical and Engineering Career Mentor

Doug Nevill spent close to 30 years working in Formula One car design, gaining a deep, hands-on understanding of car design and how engineering teams work day to day. He later led a group of 30 engineers and is valued for his calm, honest, and down-to-earth approach. He now works in World Endurance Racing.

Areas: engineering pathways, technical development, motorsport engineering experience, hiring from an engineering leader's perspective.

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/doug-nevill-bb0a382a/

### Nicola Nevill — Career Development and Transition Mentor

Nicola has spent many years supporting people in high-performance engineering environments, helping them grow, build confidence and move into the next stage of their careers. She worked in elite motorsport for over two decades, focusing on early-career development and guiding engineers, graduates and apprentices.

Areas: early-career support, career transitions, career confidence and progression, CV and positioning support.

### Who the mentoring is for

- People entering motorsport or engineering
- Those progressing early in their careers
- People leaving motorsport teams and navigating the personal and professional transition
- Those seeking clarity, confidence, and direction at any stage

### Frequently asked questions

Q: Who is the motorsport mentoring for?
A: The mentoring is for people entering motorsport or engineering, progressing early in their careers, leaving motorsport teams, or seeking clarity, confidence and direction.

Q: Who are the mentors?
A: Doug Nevill spent close to 30 years in Formula One design and now works in World Endurance Racing. Nicola Nevill worked in elite motorsport for over two decades.

Q: How does mentoring work and what does it cost?
A: Sessions are flexible and personalised to your goals. Pricing is available on enquiry. Each session focuses on practical, honest conversations with clear actions and direction.

Q: How do I get into Formula One or professional motorsport as an engineer?
A: Getting into Formula One requires a relevant engineering degree, relevant experience, strong networking, and persistence. Most engineers start with placements or roles in lower-formula teams. Doug Nevill offers honest guidance on how hiring actually works inside a professional motorsport team.

Q: Is the mentoring only for engineers?
A: No. The mentoring is open to anyone navigating a career in or around motorsport — engineers, graduates, apprentices, and those in adjacent roles. Nicola also works with people navigating broader career transitions, including those leaving motorsport entirely.

---

## Client Testimonials (https://greentrackcc.com/testimonials)

"Nicola brings together leadership experience, coaching, and a deep understanding of organisational dynamics. She helps teams and leaders find clarity, build alignment, and turn ambition into meaningful outcomes. Her approach influences not just results, but the way people work, decide, and lead." — Founder and Senior Executive

"Nicola has been a huge help in gaining clarity and perspective in the latter part of my career. I am confident she can support anyone at any stage of their career." — Senior Technical Leader, Formula One Industry

"Nicola has been instrumental in helping me shape the next phase of my career and build a strong foundation for future success as a preferred Chair and NED. Her 1-1 coaching sessions were fundamental in helping me to recognise my qualities as much as areas for improvement, and critically to look forward as to what I could offer others, rather than justify my past in the present. I cannot thank her enough." — Serial UK Biotech CXO and Entrepreneur

"I just wanted to say a huge thanks for the coaching, I feel energized and motivated following our meetings." — Executive experienced in regulated environments

"The coaching sessions are incredibly helpful and really help me see clearer my sense of purpose, my options and reminding myself I am still good at what I do. I feel a world apart from where I was before." — Senior Manager, Legal Services

"Nicky's coaching gave me the clarity and confidence to rethink my future. I ended up changing my career direction completely and I'm loving where it's taken me." — Entrepreneur and small business owner

## Contact (https://greentrackcc.com/contact)

Business: GreenTrack Coaching & Consulting Ltd
Primary contact: Nicola Nevill
Email: nicola@greentrackcc.com
Location: Oxfordshire, UK (working worldwide)
Response time: within 24 hours

Initial conversations are complimentary. No obligation, no commitment. Use the contact form at https://greentrackcc.com/contact or email nicola@greentrackcc.com directly.

What happens after contact:
1. Nicola replies within 24 hours to arrange an initial call.
2. The initial conversation is complimentary, with no pressure or obligation.
3. If there is a good fit, a coaching or mentoring programme is agreed.

---

## Pricing

GreenTrack operates a bespoke, enquiry-based pricing model. There are no fixed published rates for executive coaching, team facilitation, or mentoring. Pricing is discussed during the initial complimentary conversation and reflects the nature, scope, and duration of the engagement. Contact nicola@greentrackcc.com or use https://greentrackcc.com/contact.
